---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new micro-experience or component feature
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. E.g. "I'm always frustrated when..."

**Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. Explain the UX/DX moment you want to create or improve.

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

**API Design Proposal (if applicable)**
```html
<uibit-new-component property-name="value">
  <div slot="content">...</div>
</uibit-new-component>
```

**Additional context**
Add any other context or mockups about the feature request here.
